name: raycast-pomodoro-notion
title: PomoNotion Raycast Extension
description: A Raycast Pomodoro timer with Notion logging, ambient audio, and active-minute tracking.
author: hk_raycast

commands.name: start-pomodoro
commands.title: Start Pomodoro
commands.description: Start a new Pomodoro work session.

commands.name: pomodoro-status
commands.title: Pomodoro Status
commands.description: View and control the current Pomodoro session.

commands.name: configure-notion
commands.title: Configure Notion
commands.description: Validate Notion settings and the target database schema.

commands.name: timer-elapsed
commands.title: Internal: Timer Elapsed
commands.description: Internal command for timer completion handling.

commands.name: finish-current-session
commands.title: Finish Current Session
commands.description: Finish the current work or break session.

commands.name: discard-session
commands.title: Discard Session
commands.description: Stop the current session, optionally saving work logs.

preferences.name: notionToken
preferences.title: Notion Token (Advanced)
preferences.description: Optional manual setup. Notion Connect access token. OAuth in Configure Notion is recommended for most users.

preferences.name: notionDatabaseId
preferences.title: Notion Database ID (Advanced)
preferences.description: Optional manual setup. Database ID for Pomodoro work logs when not using OAuth database selection.

preferences.name: workMinutes
preferences.title: Work Minutes
preferences.description: Work duration in minutes for each session. Default is 25 minutes.

preferences.name: shortBreakMinutes
preferences.title: Short Break Minutes
preferences.description: Short break duration in minutes after most work sessions.

preferences.name: longBreakMinutes
preferences.title: Long Break Minutes
preferences.description: Long break duration in minutes after the configured cycle count.

preferences.name: longBreakEvery
preferences.title: Long Break Every
preferences.description: Number of completed work sessions before starting a long break.

preferences.name: workSoundFile
preferences.title: Work Sound File
preferences.description: Optional audio file to loop during work sessions.

preferences.name: breakSoundFile
preferences.title: Break Sound File
preferences.description: Optional audio file to loop during break sessions.

preferences.name: alarmSoundFile
preferences.title: Alarm Sound File
preferences.description: Optional audio file to play once when a session ends.

preferences.name: workVolume
preferences.title: Work Volume
preferences.description: Playback volume for work audio, from 0 to 100.

preferences.name: breakVolume
preferences.title: Break Volume
preferences.description: Playback volume for break audio, from 0 to 100.

preferences.name: alarmVolume
preferences.title: Alarm Volume
preferences.description: Playback volume for the alarm sound, from 0 to 100.
